title: Certificates to be valid obligations
doc_html:
§914.  Certificates to be valid obligations

In addition to the security given by the pledge of tolls as set forth in R.S. 48:913, the certificates of indebtedness shall be valid and subsisting obligations of the municipality or parish, or both, as the case may be.
doc_text:
§914.  Certificates to be valid obligations
In addition to the security given by the pledge of tolls as set forth in R.S. 48:913, the certificates of indebtedness shall be valid and subsisting obligations of the municipality or parish, or both, as the case may be.
